rulings.Case Title: SH'TARA SEGOVIA VS. MARCIA A. THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claim For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday October 22, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT MARCIA THOMAS, JENNIFER DEBERRY, DPPM, INC. D/B/A/ ZEPHYR REAL ESTATE Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claim For Attorneys Fees continued to November 16, 2018. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than October 31, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GORDON KENNY REALTY, INC. VS. ELIZABETH SCHWARTZ HAMILTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses, And For Sanctions-Discovery
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday October 22, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF GORDON KENNY REALTY, INC. Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses, And For Sanctions-Discovery GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendants shall provide responses to From Interrogatories General series 1, 15, and 50 within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Motion is DENIED as to Form Interrogatories General series 2. Request for sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES INC. VS. ROSLYN DENTLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday October 22, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT ROSLYN DENTLEY Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Plantiff GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Complete, verified responses without objections to Request for Production, Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories to be provided within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $352. = (501/REQ)
